extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters Against and By: I counted only Against our Company and Against our Subsidiaries rows, giving criminal cases of 2 + 11 = 13, statutory/regulatory actions of 0 + 1 = 1, and tax proceedings of 4 + 0 = 4; all By rows and director/promoter personal matters were excluded. No explicit aggregate litigation total is stated, so the quantified company/subsidiary components were summed: ₹9.90 million civil matters against the Company + ₹26.72 million civil matters against Subsidiaries + ₹4.03 million taxation cases against the Company = ₹40.65 million, or ₹4.065 crore; criminal and regulatory amounts marked Not quantifiable were excluded. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated Total of ₹0.56 million as of June 30, 2021, converted to ₹0.056 crore, rather than re-summed. The disclosed percentages relate to individual consumer business, regional revenues, centres, CGHS and other segments, not company-wide top-five or top-ten customer concentration for a full fiscal year; no qualifying concentration percentage is disclosed. Monetary tables use ₹ million, converted to crore at 1 crore = ₹10 million.
